content.en:
Swish!

Ye Tian's replicated body carrying the Golden Muscle Fluid immediately shifted direction and quickly left towards another position, avoiding encountering the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan.

It is possible to be a little further away, or it may be detected.

So, he had to get away from the area.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to a relatively safe area and waited silently.

He didn't look for it either, and it wasn't until a long time had passed that he re-copied a replica body and continued to lead the way.

Really.

He hadn't encountered the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan again, and the other party had long since moved away from this area.

......

On the following journey, although Ye Tian encountered some Blood Transformation Realm creatures, he did not encounter much problem with the strength of the Blood Transformation Realm creatures that were close to three Blood Transformation Realm creatures.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian is approaching the territorial waters of Wanlong.

"It's time for Wanlong's territorial waters!"

After Ye Tian entered the Wanlong Territorial Sea, this replica body did not go to the Xuanqi Territory, but returned to the Silent Black Sea.

For him, the Xuanqi Territory was just a temporary place of cultivation, and the Silent Black Sea was his foundation and hometown.

Silence the Black Sea, cutting off the boundaries of the region.

Ye Tian put the golden muscle liquid in the treasure house of the human race, and at present, the other great ancestors of the human race were not qualified to absorb the refining gold muscle liquid, and they couldn't bear it at all.

He will only take it out when they are qualified to bear it for endless years.

In the following years, Ye Tian asked a replica body to look for resources in the territorial sea boundary area near Wanlong's territorial waters, and after finding good things, he sent them into the Silent Black Sea.

This way there is no need to rush and it is safer.

Even in the area of the boundary gap of the territorial sea near Wanlong's territorial waters, there are good things, and some of them can also help him improve his strength, but the effect is mediocre.

Of course, there are dangers.

It's just that the strength of Blood Transformation Realm creatures entering Wanlong's territorial waters will be suppressed, so a single Blood Transformation Realm creature will hardly enter Wanlong's territorial waters.

Like those creatures in the Dark Sea Fragments, there are too many ordinary Heavenly Ancestor-level creatures, and these creatures will not be restricted from entering the Wanlong Territorial Sea, so the Heavenly Ancestors of the Wanlong Territorial Sea are worried that the creatures of the Hidden Sea Fragments will invade the Wanlong Territorial Sea.

For the Heavenly Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Dragons' Territorial Sea, those creatures born from the fragments of the Dark Sea were more threatening than the creatures of the Blood Transformation Realm four or five times.

In the blink of an eye, a long time has passed.

this day.

The silent Black Sea has changed.

It's going to be promoted!

"The Silent Black Sea is about to become a territory!"

Naturally, he was not surprised by this situation.

Long ago, he was working hard to improve the Silent Black Sea, and he had invested a lot of resources.

In addition, with his support and cultivation, the Silent Black Sea has given birth to many great ancestors, and even many high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Therefore, the promotion conditions of the Silent Black Sea have been met, and they will naturally be promoted from an ordinary immeasurable realm to a realm.

Bang!!!!!

The entire Silent Black Sea began to tremble, and the boundaries of the regions were shattered, but only fragments of the boundary barriers, and the countless territories of the entire region began to merge into the Silent Black Sea.

And in the silent Black Sea, countless lands, treasures, and so on began to grow.

With the protection of the origin of the Silent Black Sea, although these boundaries have been shattered and integrated into the entire new land of the Silent Black Sea, those creatures are still alive and well, at most they just feel that the heavens and the earth have changed, and the surroundings are shaken.

It didn't take long for the entire Silent Black Sea to take on a new look, as if it had completely transformed.

Meanwhile.

The Silent Black Sea is also getting bigger, the energy is rising, and the walls of the Silent Black Sea are also being strengthened and become more and more powerful.

It is not uncommon for a new realm to be born, and many Heavenly Ancestors also know that this is Ye Tian's territory, so they did not send Great Ancestors over to investigate.

this day.

Ye Tian studied the golden muscle fluid, and finally succeeded in downgrading a drop of gold muscle fluid into a large amount of ordinary gold liquid energy.

A drop of golden muscle fluid could turn into an ordinary sea of gold liquid the size of an ocean, and this kind of gold liquid energy was of no use to the Heavenly Ancestor at all, and it could even be said to be ordinary water.

This method is simply a waste, but it is a huge success for Ye Tian.

He can use these ordinary gold liquids to induce countless human beings to transform, so that the human bloodline will become strong and the foundation will be extremely strong.

Just as the Vajra Snake clan used gold muscle fluid to lay the foundation for their clansmen, he can also use gold liquid energy to lay the foundation for human beings.

In this way, it would be very easy for human beings to become a Great Ancestor.

One can imagine what a terrifying thing it would be when the human race gave birth to countless great ancestors.

In the following years, Ye Tian used this method to build seas of gold liquid energy all over the Terrans, allowing countless Terrans to enjoy the refining of the golden liquid.

Gradually, the bloodline of the human race became extremely powerful, and the speed at which the Great Ancestor was born was faster than before, I don't know how many times.

In the blink of an eye, billions of years have passed.

At this time, the Terran Race had already walked towards the entire Wanlong territorial waters, because the Terran Race had given birth to many fifth-stage great ancestors, and even the invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestors.

Among them, Ye Tian's son Ye Xingchen naturally enjoyed the best treatment under his cultivation, and even provided him with a variety of immeasurable supernatural powers and materials, so that he successfully practiced a kind of top-notch immeasurable supernatural powers and immeasurable supernatural powers on the list of immeasurable supernatural powers.

this day.

Ye Xingchen successfully transformed into the second Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor of the Human Race.

Soon, Ye Xingchen's name also began to be famous in Wanlong's territorial waters.

......

Somewhere in the Immeasurable Ruins.

Ye Xingchen was fighting with the True Night Great Ancestor, and the battle between the two sides had aroused the prying eyes of many Great Ancestors, and there were even some Heavenly Ancestors who were watching the show in secret.

"Skykiller!"

Ye Xingchen directly injured the True Night Ancestor with this immeasurable magic technique.

In the end, the True Night Ancestor escaped, announcing Ye Xingchen's victory.

Distance.

The True Night Ancestor was extremely angry, but he was helpless.

"Damn, it's just that I can't beat the Endless Great Ancestor, but I didn't expect his son to become a Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor now!"

The more he thought about it, the angrier he became.

At the same time, the terrifying growth rate of human beings has also attracted the attention of many Heavenly Ancestors.

On this day, several Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors chatted about this matter in private.

These Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors were the Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor, the Mihai Heavenly Ancestor, the Stone Mother Heavenly Ancestor, and the Winter Death Heavenly Ancestor.

"Several, the Terran Race where the Endless Great Ancestor belongs has developed too rapidly in the past few years, have you heard of it!"

Gray Mist Heavenly Ancestor was the first to speak.
